title: AI Sprouts
subtitle: Build Your AI Foundations
description: Ready to grow? Dive into the building blocks of AI — data, algorithms, and neural networks. Hands-on exercises help you build intuition before writing code.
audience: Curious learners who completed AI Seeds or have basic AI awareness
prerequisites: AI Seeds (Level 1) or basic understanding of what AI is
outcomes: Understand how data drives AI decisions
Explain what algorithms and neural networks do
Use AI tools and APIs for simple tasks
Recognise bias and ethical concerns in AI
